fidelity-studio-content-assistant.note: OAuth-protected Fidelity Studio Content Assistant MCP endpoint. Sign in with the email account Fidelity Studio invited to the CMS. Client-specific guidance is returned by get_project_context after authentication.

resend.note: Official Resend hosted MCP endpoint. Sign in with the authorized client team or account. This plugin uses it for inspection, drafts, updates, and explicitly named test recipients only; production sends and schedules are completed manually in Resend.
